scripts.build:mp-weixin: node -e "try{require('fs').rmSync('dist/wechat-clean',{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){console.warn('skip clean:',e.code||e.message)}" && set UNI_INPUT_DIR=%cd%&& set UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=%cd%\dist\wechat-clean&& uni build -p mp-weixin
scripts.test: node --experimental-default-type=module --test tests/cloud-client.test.js tests/growth-evaluation.test.js tests/sensor-data.test.js tests/session-service.test.js tests/trend-predictor.test.js
